status_notes: Initial research from Azure Managed Disks documentation, 2026-04-04. Pass 1 (service docs) and partial Pass 2 (API). Needs Pass 3 (cross-reference) and Pass 5 (human review with live Azure environment).
notes: Block storage for Azure VMs. Security focus: encryption and private access.

match_nodes.description: Encryption at rest for Azure Managed Disks

data.description: All managed disks are encrypted at rest by default. Multiple encryption options provide different levels of control and compliance.

options.description: Default. Microsoft manages keys. 256-bit AES encryption. No configuration required.
Keys managed in Azure Key Vault. Customer controls key rotation, access, and lifecycle.
Two layers of encryption: platform-managed key at infrastructure level + customer-managed or platform-managed key at service level.
Data encrypted on the VM host before being written to storage. Covers temp disks and OS/data disk caches.

default.note: All managed disks encrypted by default with platform-managed keys.

data.vendor_recommendation: Use customer-managed keys for compliance requirements. Enable encryption at host for end-to-end encryption including temp disks and caches.

match_nodes.description: Manage customer-managed keys for managed disk encryption

data.description: A resource that references a key in Azure Key Vault to enable customer-managed key encryption for managed disks. Disk encryption sets simplify key management by associating multiple disks with a single key reference.
data.vendor_recommendation: Use disk encryption sets to manage CMK encryption at scale. Associate all disks in a workload with the same disk encryption set for consistent key management.

match_nodes.description: Disable public access to managed disk export/import

data.description: Controls network access policy for managed disk export and import. By default, disks can be exported (downloaded) via a public SAS URI. Restricting to private access ensures disk data can only be exported or imported over a private endpoint.

options.description: Default. Public SAS URI access allowed for export/import.
Export/import only via private endpoint (Private Link).

default.note: Public export access is allowed by default.

data.vendor_recommendation: Set network access policy to AllowPrivate or DenyAll for disks containing sensitive data. Prevent unauthorized data exfiltration via disk export.

match_nodes.description: Control network access for managed disk snapshot export

data.description: Controls network access policy for snapshot export, similar to managed disk private access. Prevents public download of snapshot data.

options.description: Default. Public SAS URI access allowed.

default.note: Public snapshot export is allowed by default.

data.vendor_recommendation: Set snapshot network access policy to DenyAll or AllowPrivate for snapshots of sensitive workloads.
